features.name: Core Message Loop

features.name: Andy Review Ownership
features.summary: Auto-triggered review workflow for Andy-developer, including review-state progression, bounded direct review patches, and rework lineage.

features.summary: Administrative cleanup tooling for stale non-terminal Andy requests, including dry-run inspection and explicit archival/closure.

features.name: Architecture Boundary Governance
features.summary: Hard boundary contract and deterministic checks that keep upstream NanoClaw core separate from Jarvis extension logic.

features.name: Docs Topology Cleanup
features.summary: Physical docs reorganization, canonical ownership cleanup, and reference migration across root docs, group mirrors, and workflow checks.

features.name: Session Recall Tooling
features.summary: QMD recall, session export sync, startup bootstrap, and context audit utilities for local session memory hygiene.

features.name: Reliability E2E Harness

features.name: Ops and Reliability Tooling
